translation.en: I need to consolidate the data.

exampleSentencesTranslated: When it rains, everyone gather together into the coffee shop to avoid getting wet.
You should gather together all important documents in one place to make them easy to find.
I will gather together the food onto a big plate for the whole family.

example.es: Puse todo mi esfuerzo en este trabajo.
example.vi: Tôi dồn hết sức lực vào công việc này.
example.en: I put all my effort into this work.

definitions.vi: Tập trung hoặc gom lại; đẩy hoặc xô.
definitions.es: Concentrar o reunir; empujar o forzar.
definitions.en: To concentrate or gather together; to push or shove.

notes:
dồn = to gather or push things together into one place. It often has a physical feeling of piling, pressing, or concentrating.

You use it with objects, people, money, work, energy: dồn + noun, often with vào / lên + place when moving things together.  

It also means to concentrate or focus something abstract: dồn sức, dồn tiền, dồn thời gian (put all your effort/money/time into something).  

Close synonym: gom (collect), but dồn feels more like pushing or piling tightly.
exampleSentences: Khi trời mưa, mọi người dồn vào quán cà phê để tránh ướt.
Chị nên dồn tất cả giấy tờ quan trọng vào một chỗ để dễ tìm.
Anh sẽ dồn đồ ăn lên một cái đĩa lớn cho cả nhà.

translation.en: I need to consolidate the data.

notes_md:
**dồn** = to gather or push things together into one place. It often has a physical feeling of piling, pressing, or concentrating.

You use it with objects, people, money, work, energy: *dồn + noun*, often with **vào / lên + place** when moving things together.  

It also means to concentrate or focus something abstract: *dồn sức, dồn tiền, dồn thời gian* (put all your effort/money/time into something).  

Close synonym: **gom** (collect), but *dồn* feels more like pushing or piling tightly.
